action_text: Type "Reports" into the All menu Filter field
rationale: Using the left navigation filter is the fastest way to locate the Reports module to reach View/Run

action_text: Type "report" into the All menu Filter field
rationale: If case sensitivity or partial matching behaves differently, a lowercase partial term may surface the module

action_text: Type "View/Run" into the All menu Filter field
rationale: Directly filtering for the specific module name could take us straight to the desired item

action_text: Click the Filter input in the left navigation panel
rationale: Ensure the filter input is focused and ready for typing in case it isn't active yet

action_text: Type "Reports View/Run" into the global Search field
rationale: If the left nav filter fails, the global search can be used to locate the Reports View/Run module
